resume.title: Lead Frontend Engineer
resume.description: Modernized legacy enterprise platforms by migrating Classic ASP systems to React + TypeScript architectures with REST APIs. Led application architecture, deployment, and security implementation while optimizing CI/CD pipelines and integrating third-party services to expand platform functionality.

resume.title: Marketing Technologist / Digital Creator
resume.description: Designed and developed responsive email campaigns by translating Figma layouts into production-ready HTML templates optimized for cross-client compatibility. Built and deployed lifecycle automation flows in Klaviyo (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, winback), collaborating with marketing and creative teams to ensure brand consistency, performance, and timely campaign launches.

resume.title: Backend Developer & Datbase Analyst
resume.description: Engineered Python and PHP backend solutions supporting real-time OEM/product databases and customer analytics systems. Automated data processing and reporting pipelines, reducing reporting time by 50% while eliminating 75% of manual workflows.
